'''âj-sh-h''' ('''kajashah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:voyd|voyd]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-sh-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:voyd|voyd]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-sh-h
|-
! Lemma
| kajashah
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijashah|thijashah]] || [[word:jijashah|jijashah]] || [[word:shijashah|shijashah]] || [[word:kijashah|kijashah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujashah|thuthujashah]] || [[word:jujujashah|jujujashah]] || [[word:shushujashah|shushujashah]] || [[word:kukujashah|kukujashah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujashah|thujashah]] || [[word:jujashah|jujashah]] || [[word:shujashah|shujashah]] || [[word:kujashah|kujashah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujashah|thujashah]] || [[word:jujashah|jujashah]] || [[word:shujashah|shujashah]] || [[word:kujashah|kujashah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejashah|thejashah]] || [[word:jejashah|jejashah]] || [[word:shejashah|shejashah]] || [[word:kejashah|kejashah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojashah|thothojashah]] || [[word:jojojashah|jojojashah]] || [[word:shoshojashah|shoshojashah]] || [[word:kokojashah|kokojashah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojashah|thojashah]] || [[word:jojashah|jojashah]] || [[word:shojashah|shojashah]] || [[word:kojashah|kojashah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojashah|thojashah]] || [[word:jojashah|jojashah]] || [[word:shojashah|shojashah]] || [[word:kojashah|kojashah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠjashah|thĂŠjashah]] || [[word:jĂŠjashah|jĂŠjashah]] || [[word:shĂŠjashah|shĂŠjashah]] || [[word:kĂŠjashah|kĂŠjashah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajashah|thathajashah]] || [[word:jajajashah|jajajashah]] || [[word:shashajashah|shashajashah]] || [[word:kakajashah|kakajashah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajashah|thajashah]] || [[word:jajashah|jajashah]] || [[word:shajashah|shajashah]] || [[word:kajashah|kajashah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajashah|thajashah]] || [[word:jajashah|jajashah]] || [[word:shajashah|shajashah]] || [[word:kajashah|kajashah]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shajashah|shajashah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshajashah|goshajashah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishajashah|gokishajashah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shajashahnĂŒ|shajashahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshajashahnknĂŒ|goshajashahnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishajashahnĂŒ|gokishajashahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shajashahshĂ«|shajashahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshajashahnkshĂ«|goshajashahnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishajashahshĂ«|gokishajashahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajashahro|shajashahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajashahnkro|goshajashahnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajashahro|gokishajashahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shajashahmu|shajashahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajashahnkmu|goshajashahnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajashahmu|gokishajashahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shajashahsher|shajashahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshajashahnksher|goshajashahnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishajashahsher|gokishajashahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shajashahng|shajashahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshajashahnkng|goshajashahnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishajashahng|gokishajashahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shajashahya|shajashahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshajashahnkya|goshajashahnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishajashahya|gokishajashahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shajashahyam|shajashahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshajashahnkyam|goshajashahnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishajashahyam|gokishajashahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajashahnĂŒshĂ«|shajashahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajashahnknĂŒshĂ«|goshajashahnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajashahnĂŒshĂ«|gokishajashahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajashahnĂŒro|shajashahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajashahnknĂŒro|goshajashahnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajashahnĂŒro|gokishajashahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajashahnĂŒmu|shajashahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajashahnknĂŒmu|goshajashahnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajashahnĂŒmu|gokishajashahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajashahshĂ«nĂŒ|shajashahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajashahnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshajashahnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajashahshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishajashahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajashahshĂ«ro|shajashahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajashahnkshĂ«ro|goshajashahnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajashahshĂ«ro|gokishajashahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajashahshĂ«mu|shajashahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajashahnkshĂ«mu|goshajashahnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajashahshĂ«mu|gokishajashahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajashahronĂŒ|shajashahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajashahnkronĂŒ|goshajashahnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajashahronĂŒ|gokishajashahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajashahroshĂ«|shajashahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajashahnkroshĂ«|goshajashahnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajashahroshĂ«|gokishajashahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajashahromu|shajashahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajashahnkromu|goshajashahnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajashahromu|gokishajashahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajashahmunĂŒ|shajashahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajashahnkmunĂŒ|goshajashahnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajashahmunĂŒ|gokishajashahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajashahmushĂ«|shajashahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajashahnkmushĂ«|goshajashahnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajashahmushĂ«|gokishajashahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajashahmuro|shajashahmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajashahnkmuro|goshajashahnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajashahmuro|gokishajashahmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
